scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "corepack pnpm --filter @robot-rebound/server dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @robot-rebound/client dev"
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @robot-rebound/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @robot-rebound/server test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @robot-rebound/shared build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
